# The REST API serves real JSON over a real local listener.
env MINA_FX_AUTO_LOAD_ENABLED=false
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/rest.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
stdout '"schema_version":[1-9][0-9]*'
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/categories
stdout '"categories":\[\]'
httpget -status 404 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/missing
stdout '\{"error":\{"code":"not_found","message":"route not found"\}\}'
httpget -method POST -status 405 http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health
stdout '\{"error":\{"code":"method_not_allowed","message":"method not allowed"\}\}'
kill -INT server
wait server

# File-backed demo startup refuses when the configured schema already exists, even if empty.
! exec mina serve --demo --db $WORK/rest.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port 0 --quiet
stderr 'demo seeding requires schema "main" to not already exist'

# The REST API can serve from an omitted database path for ephemeral sessions.
freeport
exec mina serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
kill -INT server
wait server
stderr 'warning: no --db provided; using ephemeral in-memory accounting state'

# Demo startup seeding works with omitted database path for ephemeral sessions.
freeport
exec mina serve --demo --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/transactions
stdout '"transactions":\['
stdout '"transaction_id"'
kill -INT server
wait server
stderr 'warning: no --db provided; using ephemeral in-memory accounting state'

# Access logs default to stderr.
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/rest-default-log.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health
kill -INT server
wait server
stderr 'GET /health 200'

# Quiet mode disables access logs.
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/rest-quiet.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health
kill -INT server
wait server
! stderr .

# Access logs can be redirected to a file.
freeport
exec mina serve --db $WORK/rest-file-log.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --access-log $WORK/access.log &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health
kill -INT server
wait server
! stderr .
grep 'GET /health 200' $WORK/access.log

# Demo startup seeding populates visible REST data.
freeport
exec mina serve --demo --db $WORK/rest-demo.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/transactions
stdout '"transactions":\['
stdout '"transaction_id"'
kill -INT server
wait server

# File-backed demo startup refuses when the configured schema already exists.
! exec mina serve --demo --db $WORK/rest-demo.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port 0 --quiet
stderr 'demo seeding requires schema "main" to not already exist'
